description_long: This rifle features a robust, dark reddish-brown body with a thumbhole stock, providing ergonomic support for the shooter. The receiver and barrel assembly are accented with metallic and black components, and the rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine beneath the action. The handguard is ribbed for grip, and the barrel is topped with a prominent flash hider at the muzzle. The sighting system appears to be a set of iron sights integrated into the top rail. The overall design suggests a modern, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments, with a visible cartridge depicted in mid-air as if being fired.
description: A modern, reddish-brown rifle with a thumbhole stock, detachable box magazine, ribbed handguard, iron sights, and a flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, thumbhole stock, magazine, ribbed handguard, and flash hider clearly.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the thumbhole stock, magazine, and handguard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
